# Bundled schemas

<!-- This file is auto-generated by `scripts/gen_docs.py`. Do not edit by hand — re-run the generator instead. -->

These NetBox OpenAPI snapshots ship inside the wheel and serve as the offline
fallback when a live schema can't be fetched and no per-profile cache exists.

|---|---|
| `4.6.0-beta2` | `netbox-4.6.0-beta2.json.gz` |
